# Nine Gates Mahjong

Nine Gates Mahjong is a free browser portal operated by Fire Dragon Interactive. It clearly separates Mahjongg Solitaire tile-matching games from traditional four-player Mahjong.

Last reviewed: 2026-07-22 (production audit release)

## Primary sections

- https://ninegatesmahjong.com/play — all free game modes
- https://ninegatesmahjong.com/mahjongg-solitaire — solvable layered Mahjongg Solitaire
- https://ninegatesmahjong.com/daily — shared daily Mahjongg puzzle
- https://ninegatesmahjong.com/real-mahjong — simplified four-seat Mahjong training versus AI
- https://ninegatesmahjong.com/variants — comparison of regional Mahjong variants
- https://ninegatesmahjong.com/learn — Mahjong and Mahjongg learning hub
- https://ninegatesmahjong.com/how-to-play — interactive tutorials
- https://ninegatesmahjong.com/history — history of Mahjong and Mahjongg Solitaire
- https://ninegatesmahjong.com/lobby — private multiplayer training rooms

## Playable ruleset trainers

- https://ninegatesmahjong.com/real-mahjong/hong-kong
- https://ninegatesmahjong.com/real-mahjong/riichi
- https://ninegatesmahjong.com/real-mahjong/mcr
- https://ninegatesmahjong.com/real-mahjong/american
- https://ninegatesmahjong.com/real-mahjong/taiwanese
- https://ninegatesmahjong.com/real-mahjong/sichuan
- https://ninegatesmahjong.com/real-mahjong/zung-jung

## Ruleset scope

The Hong Kong, Japanese Riichi, Chinese Official MCR, American, Taiwanese, Sichuan Bloody Rules and Zung Jung interactive modes are guided trainers. They demonstrate selected concepts and simplified winning-hand flows; they do not implement every scoring rule, claim, penalty, round condition or official tournament interpretation.

## Editorial policy

Guides use answer-first summaries, distinguish traditional Mahjong from Mahjongg Solitaire, and identify simplified training behaviour. Competitive players should verify the rules used by their association, table or tournament.

Pages use canonical URLs, crawlable answer summaries, visible review dates, and structured data that matches the on-page subject. The XML sitemap at https://ninegatesmahjong.com/sitemap.xml is the complete list of public indexable routes.

## Access and privacy

Core games can be played without an account and without accepting optional third-party advertising. Account, profile, multiplayer and advertising details are described at https://ninegatesmahjong.com/privacy.
